product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well! I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I'm really interested in it. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can offer it to you for $1,500. Let me know if this works for you. Thank you for considering it!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. Unfortunately, the maximum budget I have for this purchase is $1,799, so I won't be able to accept your offer of $1,500. If you can reconsider your price, I would be happy to proceed. Thank you.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints. Considering that, I can offer you the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $1,700. Let me know if this works for you. Thank you for considering it!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the revised offer. I appreciate your flexibility. I'm happy to accept the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV for $1,700. When can I expect the delivery? Thank you for your assistance.
